bio1: Computer Engineer with 10+ years building end-to-end digital products, from modern interfaces to scalable APIs, cloud infrastructure, and production deployments.
bio2: Specialized in React and Angular with strong backend experience across microservices, databases, mobile development, and product-oriented architecture.

desc: Designed and developed an end-to-end digital ecosystem from scratch using React 19, Node.js (Express), and PostgreSQL, accelerating MVP launch and supporting complex queries.
Optimized performance and user experience through React Query, reducing API load and improving perceived response speed by 30%.
Implemented an admin panel with CRUD, JWT, and Firebase Auth, enabling autonomous content, user, and permission management without technical dependency.
Automated the CI/CD pipeline with GitHub Actions and deployed on Linux VPS + PM2, ensuring operational stability and high availability.
Led the development of a cross-platform app (iOS / Android / PWA) using Angular 18 + Ionic + Firebase.
Implemented real-time Firestore to improve shipment tracking and instant state synchronization.
Optimized onboarding through Google and Apple Auth, increasing new user registrations by 25%.
Integrated segmented push notifications to improve retention and operational communication.
Managed deployments across AWS S3, Google Play, and the App Store.
Developed the Innvierte enterprise application focused on corporate investment management.
Designed and maintained a reusable component library with Angular 17 + Storybook.
Implemented advanced search and filtering over large data volumes using microfrontends.
Introduced unit and functional testing with Jest and Jasmine.
Contributed to the development of web and mobile applications for Catalonia Government data management.
Implemented new views, workflows, and components in Angular 17 and Bootstrap.
Designed new endpoints and microservices in Spring Boot.
Collaborated on microfrontend architecture and distributed systems.
Contributed to the migration of a legacy system into a modern web architecture.
Designed APIs and backend services with Spring Boot.
Implemented a new frontend application using Angular + Materialize.
Designed automated tests for mobile applications and backend services.
Built load and performance tests with Apache JMeter on AWS.
Automated CI/CD pipelines with Docker and Jenkins.
Led the QA team in Argentina.
Contributed to ERP, CRM, and enterprise software solutions.
Implemented REST services and backend business logic in Java.
Optimized SQL queries and application performance.
Developed frontend features for business modules.
